admin_apikeys.html:
API keys
API keys are used to authenticate external services (e.g. n8n, Zapier) with the XRay API. Keys are shown only once at creation time. Use them as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header.
New API key created
Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
NameKey prefixScopesLast usedExpiresStatus
No API keys yet
Generate an API key to connect external services like n8n to XRay.
Generate new API key
admin_apikeys.js: function initApiKeys(container, api, user) { var tbody = container.querySelector('#apikeys-tbody'); var emptyEl = container.querySelector('#apikey-empty'); var modal = container.querySelector('#apikey-modal'); var banner = container.querySelector('#apikey-created-banner'); function loadKeys() { api.get('/api/api-keys').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var keys = r.data; if (keys.length === 0) { emptyEl.style.display = ''; tbody.parentElement.style.display = 'none'; return; } emptyEl.style.display = 'none'; tbody.parentElement.style.display = ''; tbody.innerHTML = keys.map(function(k) { var status = k.is_active ? "Active" : "Revoked"; var lastUsed = k.last_used_at ? new Date(k.last_used_at).toLocaleDateString() : 'Never'; var expires = k.expires_at ? new Date(k.expires_at).toLocaleDateString() : 'Never'; return '' + k.name + '' + k.key_prefix + '...' + (k.scopes||[]).join(', ') + '' + lastUsed + '' + expires + '' + status + '' + (k.is_active ? "" : '') + ''; }).join(''); }); } container.querySelector('#btn-create-apikey').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'flex'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-close-apikey-modal').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'none'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-cancel-apikey').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'none'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-submit-apikey').onclick = function() { var name = container.querySelector('#apikey-name').value.trim(); var checked = container.querySelectorAll('#apikey-scopes input:checked'); var scopes = []; checked.forEach(function(c) { scopes.push(c.value); }); if (!name || scopes.length === 0) { alert('Name and at least one scope are required.'); return; } var body = { name: name, scopes: scopes }; var tenantId = container.querySelector('#apikey-tenant').value; if (tenantId) body.tenantId = tenantId; var expires = container.querySelector('#apikey-expires').value; if (expires) body.expiresAt = new Date(expires).toISOString(); api.post('/api/api-keys', body).then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) { alert(r.error ? r.error.message : 'Failed to create API key'); return; } modal.style.display = 'none'; banner.style.display = ''; container.querySelector('#apikey-created-value').textContent = r.data.key; container.querySelector('#btn-copy-apikey').onclick = function() { navigator.clipboard.writeText(r.data.key); this.textContent = 'Copied!'; }; container.querySelector('#apikey-name').value = ''; checked.forEach(function(c) { c.checked = false; }); loadKeys(); }); }; window.revokeApiKey = function(id) { if (!confirm('Revoke this API key? External services using it will lose access.')) return; api.delete('/api/api-keys/' + id).then(function() { loadKeys(); }); }; api.get('/api/admin/tenants?limit=100').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var sel = container.querySelector('#apikey-tenant'); (r.data.data || r.data || []).forEach(function(t) { var opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = t.id; opt.textContent = t.name + ' (' + t.slug + ')'; sel.appendChild(opt); }); }); loadKeys(); }

admin_meet.html:
MEET integration
Video conferencing
Configure the MEET server connection for in-app video calls. Users will see a floating call button on every page once configured.
XRay Support
Configure the XRay Support button that appears in the MEET menu. When a tenant clicks it, platform admins receive a notification to join the call.
The meeting room code and join URL will be passed as query parameters.
How it works
  • Once configured, a floating video call button appears on every screen for all users.
  • Users can start a new meeting or join by room code/link.
  • The call opens in a popup overlay with three display modes: fullscreen (fills viewport below header), picture-in-picture (small draggable window), or minimized (collapsed bar with restore option).
  • Closing the meeting removes the call window entirely.
  • Meetings use the MEET server for signaling and media — no data passes through XRay.

audit.js: function initAudit(container, api, user) { api.get('/api/audit').then(function(r) { var tbody = container.querySelector('#audit-tbody'); var empty = container.querySelector('#audit-empty'); var rows = r.ok ? (Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : (r.data && r.data.data ? r.data.data : [])) : []; if (rows.length === 0) { empty.style.display = ''; tbody.parentElement.style.display = 'none'; return; } empty.style.display = 'none'; tbody.parentElement.style.display = ''; tbody.innerHTML = rows.map(function(e) { var meta = e.metadata || e.details || null; var details = meta ? (typeof meta === 'string' ? meta : JSON.stringify(meta)).substring(0, 80) : '-'; return '' + new Date(e.created_at).toLocaleString() + '' + (e.user_email || e.user_name || '-') + '' + e.action + '' + (e.resource_type || '-') + '' + details + ''; }).join(''); }); }

admin_stripe.html:
Stripe Configuration
API Keys
All keys are stored encrypted. The secret key and webhook secret can also be set via environment variables (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET) which take precedence.
Webhook Endpoint
Configure this URL in your Stripe Dashboard → Webhooks.
checkout.session.completed invoice.paid invoice.payment_failed customer.subscription.updated customer.subscription.deleted payment_intent.succeeded
Gate Products
Products that grant dashboard access. Toggle Active to use a product as a gate.
Status

Subscription status for all tenants. You can manually link a Stripe customer to fix missed webhooks.

admin_audit.js: function initAdminAudit(container, api, user) { api.get('/api/admin/audit').then(function(r) { var tbody = container.querySelector('#admin-audit-tbody'); var empty = container.querySelector('#admin-audit-empty'); if (!r.ok || !r.data || r.data.length === 0) { empty.style.display = ''; tbody.parentElement.style.display = 'none'; return; } empty.style.display = 'none'; tbody.innerHTML = r.data.map(function(e) { return '' + new Date(e.created_at).toLocaleString() + '' + (e.tenant_name || '-') + '' + (e.user_email || '-') + '' + e.action + '' + (e.resource_type || '-') + '' + (e.ip_address || '-') + ''; }).join(''); }); }

admin_webhooks.html:
Webhooks
Webhooks send event notifications from XRay to external URLs you specify. When events happen (e.g. account created, dashboard opened, meet started), XRay will POST a JSON payload to your endpoint. Each webhook is signed with HMAC-SHA256 for verification.
NameTarget URLEventsStatusLast triggeredFailures
No webhooks yet
Create a webhook to send event notifications to an external URL.
Webhook created
Save the signing secret below. It will not be shown again. Use it to verify HMAC-SHA256 signatures on incoming payloads.
Signing secret: 
Create webhook

admin_portability.html:
Import / Export
Export platform data
Download a ZIP archive containing all platform data: tenants, members, dashboards, connections, roles, email templates, and associated images.
Import platform data
Upload a previously exported XRay ZIP archive. Existing records will be preserved — only new data is imported (no overwrites).

Drag & drop a .zip file here

or click to browse
admin_portability.css: .port-view .port-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px}@media(max-width:768px){.port-view .port-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.port-options{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-top:8px}.port-check{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--t2)}.port-check input[type=checkbox]{width:18px;height:18px;accent-color:var(--acc);cursor:pointer}.port-check span{user-select:none}.port-dropzone{border:2px dashed var(--bdr2);border-radius:12px;padding:40px 20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s;color:var(--t2)}.port-dropzone:hover,.port-dropzone.dragover{border-color:var(--acc);background:var(--acc-dim)}.port-dropzone svg{margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--t3)}.port-dropzone p{margin:4px 0}.port-status-ok{background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);color:#22c55e;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.2)}.port-status-err{background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:#ef4444;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2)}.port-status-info{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);color:#818cf8;border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,.2)}.import-result-table{width:100%;font-size:13px;border-collapse:collapse;margin-top:8px}.import-result-table th{text-align:left;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--t2);font-weight:500;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bdr);font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase}.import-result-table td{padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bdr)}.import-result-table .num{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600}
